About Me

Who I Am

A little about my background and how I work.

I'm an SEO Specialist with over 2 years of hands-on experience helping businesses grow their online presence. I work with clients in Pakistan and the UAE across industries like transport, education, ecommerce, and healthcare.

I graduated and built my skills through real projects — not just theory. I understand how Google works and I focus on results that actually bring in leads and customers for my clients.

Whether it's a local business that wants to show up on Google Maps, an online store that needs more traffic, or a blog that should rank for the right keywords — I can help with all of it.

What I Do

My Services

I offer a full range of SEO services that bring real results for businesses of all sizes.

📍

Local SEO

I help local businesses rank in Google's local search results and Maps so people nearby find you first.

📌

Google My Business (GMB)

I create, optimize, and fully manage your GMB profile to generate more calls, direction requests, and leads from Google Maps.

🛒

Ecommerce SEO

I optimize online stores to rank product pages higher on Google, bringing more traffic and sales without paid ads.

📝

On-Page SEO

From title tags to headings to content structure — I make sure every page on your site is fully optimized for search engines.

⚙️

Technical SEO

Site speed, crawlability, schema markup, canonical tags, and all the technical fixes that help Google understand your website better.

✍️

Blog & Article Ranking

I write and optimize blog content that targets the right keywords and brings steady organic traffic to your website over time.

🔗

Off-Page SEO & Link Building

I build quality backlinks and manage your website's authority to help it rank higher in competitive search results.

🖥️

WordPress SEO Setup

I set up and configure WordPress sites with the right SEO plugins, settings, and structure from the very beginning.
